aiCfoSubtitle: Get a short CFO comment from Gemini.
aiCfoSubtitleActive: Your latest analysis is below. Click for a new analysis.

tips.highDebtDescription: Your total debts constitute {{debtRatio}}% of your assets. Focus on debt reduction first.
tips.investmentTimeDescription: You have {{safeToSpend}} safe spending limit. You can direct some of it to investments.
tips.receivableFollowupDescription: You have {{totalReceivables}} in receivables. Don't forget to follow up on your collections.
tips.greatJobDescription: Your net worth is {{netWorth}}. Continue to your financial goals with regular savings.
tips.installmentLoadDescription: You have {{totalInstallments}} monthly installments. Avoid new borrowing.
tips.emergencyFundDescription: Aim to create an emergency fund that covers 3-6 months of your expenses. Be prepared for unexpected situations.
tips.budgetPlanningDescription: Try the 50/30/20 rule: Allocate 50% of your income to needs, 30% to wants, and 20% to savings.
tips.longTermThinkingDescription: Starting retirement planning early allows you to maximize the power of compound interest.
tips.smallSavingsBigResultsDescription: If you save just 50₺ a day, you can save 18,250₺ a year. Every small step matters!
tips.automaticSavingsDescription: Automatically transfer a portion of your money to a savings account on your payday. You won't spend money you don't see.
tips.creditCardInterestTrapDescription: Don't pay off your credit card debt with minimum payments. Interest rates can go up to 40%!
tips.diversificationIsImportantDescription: Don't put all your eggs in one basket. Reduce risk by diversifying your investments across different areas.
tips.inflationEffectDescription: Keeping your money only in a bank account causes it to lose value due to inflation. Invest!
tips.hourRuleDescription: Wait 24 hours before big purchases. This reduces impulse spending by 70%.
tips.insuranceNeglectDescription: Do not neglect your health, life, and motor insurance. Small premiums protect against major disasters.
tips.createPassiveIncomeDescription: Aim to create passive income sources such as rental income, dividend stocks, or online content.
tips.financialEducationDescription: Read at least one financial book or listen to a podcast a month. Knowledge is the most valuable investment.
tips.subscriptionControlDescription: Cancel unused subscriptions. The average person pays 200₺+ for unnecessary subscriptions monthly.
tips.setYourGoalsDescription: Set short, medium, and long-term financial goals. Clear goals increase motivation.
tips.salaryIncreaseRuleDescription: When your salary increases, direct at least half of the increase to savings. Don't always increase your standard of living.
tips.strengthenFinancialPlanDescription: You can improve your financial situation by saving regularly and tracking your expenses.

errors.quota: 📊 Your API quota is exhausted. Please try again later.
errors.throttle: ⏱️ Too many requests. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
errors.serviceBusy: 🔧 Service busy. Please try again shortly.

alerts.apiKeyRequiredMessage: You need to add your Gemini API key to get AI CFO analysis. Getting a free key only takes a few minutes.

dataSecureHint: Your data is secure on this device
